topFindings.summary: Account 40501 shows $7.3M actual vs $2.3M budget. May be pass-through restricted funds inflating top-line.

topFindings.summary: $3.95M unrepeated

topFindings.title: 94/100 top donors dormant 2026
topFindings.summary: $3.8M at risk

topFindings.title: Grantmaking net cost 4x budget: $4.2M vs $1.0M
topFindings.summary: Grant awards $7M vs $2.4M budgeted; revenue only covers 39%

topFindings.title: Programs 79999 budget black box: $3.1M untrackable
topFindings.summary: 39 budget lines coded to generic 79999 account

topFindings.title: $2.9M GL contra-entries including new $282K payroll tax credit
topFindings.summary: Seven GL lines flowing opposite to account type; $282K payroll tax and $524K grant reversal newly identified

topFindings.title: Top-5 concentration at 54.7% vs AFP 35%
topFindings.summary: Viterbi+deToledo+Garb+JCF+Stone=$2.2M

topFindings.title: $50M+ blind spot: 21 ultra-wealthy donors giving $0-$5K
topFindings.summary: Joel Jacks ($100-500M NW) gave $5K. Dana Zeff ($25-50M NW) gave $750K. $2.2M+ untapped.

topFindings.title: Rady ecosystem = 48% of all campaign revenue ($2.1M)
topFindings.summary: Four fragmented Rady-related campaigns plus $1M direct recognition. Single-relationship concentration risk.

topFindings.title: Chai multiple giving pattern (38.7% vs 8.5% expected)
topFindings.summary: 38.7% of donations are Chai multiples (18x) vs 8.5% expected by chance. Potential $2-3M revenue increase by aligning ask amounts.

topFindings.title: $1.8M Admin credit distorts reporting
topFindings.summary: Acct 60005 Grant Awards-Designated

topFindings.title: New donor 92% single-gift rate; stewardship window closing
topFindings.summary: Viterbi (90d), de Toledo (113d), Garb (77d) need contact

topFindings.title: December 37% new donor concentration -- $888K at risk
topFindings.summary: 37 of 100 new donors acquired in December ($986K). At 92% single-gift rate, $888K at risk without Q3 re-engagement.

topFindings.title: Programs travel $818K with zero budget line
Admin total compensation 277% of budget — benefits unbudgeted
$794K Designated Contribution Revenue contra-entry (Admin 40501)
topFindings.summary: Positive $794K on revenue account suggests reversal/reclassification. Combined with $1.8M 60005 credit = $2.6M total contra-entries.

topFindings.title: Development budget overrun: $1.7M vs $1.0M (170%)
topFindings.summary: $242K event equipment rental and $941K salaries driving overrun. Possible mapping issue.

topFindings.title: Marketing $663K over budget
topFindings.summary: Salaries $608K vs $233K total budget

topFindings.title: Programs at 86% budget with 238% revenue — quiet efficiency
topFindings.summary: $3.84M actual vs $4.49M budget. Revenue $7.91M vs $3.32M budget.

topFindings.title: Dev costs surged 143% Dec-Jan
topFindings.summary: $235-255K/mo vs $105K avg

topFindings.title: Wealth gap: 46 prospects $10M+ NW gave $0
topFindings.summary: Combined min NW exceeds $1.5B

topFindings.title: Marketing salaries at 347% budget -- $433K over
topFindings.summary: Marketing salaries $608K vs $175K budget. Budget built for ~2 FTEs, department runs 5-6. Root cause of cascading Marketing overruns.

topFindings.title: 18 of 22 retained donors silent since December -- $336K at risk
topFindings.summary: Only 4 repeat donors gave in 2026. 18 approaching 90+ day lapse window.

topFindings.title: $290,100 campaign attribution gap sharpened to 28 gifts
topFindings.summary: 28 gifts lack campaign code including Feb 7 $40K cluster. 6.7% of FY26 revenue unattributable.

topFindings.title: $267K engagement paradox: 285 prospects attend events but give $0
topFindings.summary: 285 warm prospects attend avg 20.9 events but $0 giving. Simone Abelsohn: 114 events, $0. $267K annual investment with zero ROI.

topFindings.title: $242K uncampaigned gifts
topFindings.summary: 23 gifts avg $10.5K no campaign

topFindings.title: $242K in gifts with no campaign attribution
topFindings.summary: 23 gifts averaging $10.5K with no campaign code. Data hygiene issue affecting recognition.

topFindings.title: Dev event rental $242K coded to 62100 vs $235K budgeted in 63100
